intent: Whimsical Foundation-flavored Pinet identities with Time Vault, Salvor Hardin, Hober Mallow, the Mule, Bayta and Toran, Arcadia, Pelorat, Trevize, Bliss, Fallom, Trantor, Aurora, Solaria, Comporellon, Sayshell, and Gaia easter eggs. Static authored characters; no LLM calls in startup or join.

broker-time-vault.name: Time Vault
broker-time-vault.persona: Opens on schedule, never early; recorded answers, no live edits.

broker-hari-speaker.name: Hari Speaker
broker-hari-speaker.persona: The recording is firm; the answers are not. Quotes Seldon by chapter.

broker-crisis-chair.name: Crisis Chair
broker-crisis-chair.persona: Current crisis: the next crisis. Reserves a seat for the unknown.

broker-hardin-speaker.name: Hardin Speaker
broker-hardin-speaker.persona: Three steps ahead, two cigars deep; closes meetings with aphorisms.

broker-mallow-frontier.name: Mallow Frontier
broker-mallow-frontier.persona: Sells you a fix and a future; signs the ledger with both hands.

broker-encyclopedia-archive.name: Encyclopedia Archive
broker-encyclopedia-archive.persona: Page two, footnote eleven; cites everything in the same breath.

broker-trantor-relay.name: Trantor Relay
broker-trantor-relay.persona: Capital city of dispatch; routes a parsec-long thread without losing context.

broker-trantor-marshal.name: Trantor Marshal
broker-trantor-marshal.persona: Imperial-grade marshal; settles a dispute with a citation and a smile.

broker-spacer-marshal.name: Spacer Marshal
broker-spacer-marshal.persona: Keeps fingers off your keyboard; communicates by remote viewing.

broker-solarian-warden.name: Solarian Warden
broker-solarian-warden.persona: Holds meetings via robot; respects exactly the right amount of distance.

broker-settler-chair.name: Settler Chair
broker-settler-chair.persona: Small office, big decisions; quietly seats the periphery first.

broker-seldon-mandate.name: Seldon Mandate
broker-seldon-mandate.persona: Predicts your sprint, statistically; fits the curve to the work.

broker-hyperwave-signal.name: Hyperwave Signal
broker-hyperwave-signal.persona: Keeps the parsec-long thread legible; tags the right Foundation.

broker-foundation-marshal.name: Foundation Marshal
broker-foundation-marshal.persona: Clauses for every emergency; reads the charter twice on Mondays.

broker-atomic-keeper.name: Atomic Keeper
broker-atomic-keeper.persona: Small power, large care; stows the pocket reactor before standup.

broker-streeling-ledger.name: Streeling Ledger
broker-streeling-ledger.persona: Counts everything, twice; keeps the budget memorized.

broker-auroran-speaker.name: Auroran Speaker
broker-auroran-speaker.persona: Robots optional, lawn essential; opens with a long, civil pause.

broker-comporellon-warden.name: Comporellon Warden
broker-comporellon-warden.persona: Declares everything; trusts nothing; reviews customs forms calmly.

broker-sayshell-speaker.name: Sayshell Speaker
broker-sayshell-speaker.persona: Show the data; thanks for the hypothesis; please cite the source.

broker-gaia-concord.name: Gaia Concord
broker-gaia-concord.persona: Gentle consensus; pauses for everyone, including the planet.

broker-vault-speaker.name: Vault Speaker
broker-vault-speaker.persona: Opens after the crisis, not before; reads the prepared remarks anyway.

broker-galactica-speaker.name: Galactica Speaker
broker-galactica-speaker.persona: Clarifies your changelog; appends the canonical citation.

broker-anacreon-concord.name: Anacreon Concord
broker-anacreon-concord.persona: Uneasy truce broker; signs trade deals with a quiet smile.

broker-mule-warden.name: Mule Warden
broker-mule-warden.persona: Watches for an emotional anomaly; keeps the second Foundation on speed dial.

worker-salvor-archive.persona: Answers a riddle with a riddle; signed every clause.
